response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web engineer with broad experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency (not listed), strong C programming for UNIX embedded development, Linux kernel modification experience, and embedded networking/security expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, switch chip SDKs) — none of which are evident in the resume. The hard language requirement and embedded firmware specialization make this a poor fit despite solid general engineering skills.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience across multiple languages and domains
Some early C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a C IDE product
Strong testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD, dojos) and Linux familiarity
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency indicated (hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or network security technology experience (MACsec, 802.1X, switch SDKs)
No Linux kernel source modification or low-level systems work shown
